use_cases: Animated hero section tagline that types out words sequentially
Interactive loading state with typewriter-style text reveal
Terminal-style text animation for dev tools or command interfaces
Storytelling text reveal for marketing landing pages
ai_summary: A configurable React typewriter component that sequentially displays text with character-by-character typing animation and optional cursor blinking. Supports customizable typing speed, delay between words, and cursor character. Perfect for creating engaging text animations in hero sections, loading states, or terminal-style interfaces.
